home.description: I reworked the site direction toward a stronger chrome-glass look: clearer sectors, futuristic controls, modular cards and a more consistent archive mood.

music.label: music sector / soundboard edition
music.title: sound, style and
music.description: This section now feels more like a media deck: mood filters, highlighted tracks, a video preview area and stronger chrome-glass presentation.
music.curated: A curated mood tile for the era: image, movement and attitude tied directly to sound.
music.about: 2000s music was never just audio. It lived inside TV visuals, styling codes, posters, icons and burned playlists. This panel can later be expanded with real albums, clips or custom playlists.

fashion.label: fashion sector / chroma scanner
fashion.title: chrome, candy and
fashion.description: This section now has a clearer design tool feel: palette switching, styling cards and a stronger connection between fashion and technology.

pieces.p2note: A must-have for the futuristic silhouette.
pieces.p5note: One of the clearest era signifiers.
pieces.p6note: Athletic shine mixed with sci-fi styling.

games.label: games sector / archive mode
games.title: browser toys, score loops and
games.description: I kept the archive idea but made it cleaner: easier filtering, more consistent cards and stronger Y2K chrome presentation.
games.keyboard: keyboard: G = glitch / R = random artifact

entries.e4note: Interaction for mood rather than goals.

internet.label: internet sector / archive mode
internet.title: personal pages, web rings and
internet.description: Your separate internet page now fits the whole project better: still nostalgic, but cleaner and more usable as a real archive interface.

about.label: about / project direction
about.title: what was improved in the
about.description: The site now behaves more like a designed digital archive instead of separate unrelated pages. Every sector still has its own character, but the system is more unified and much closer to a Y2K chroma aesthetic.

upgrades.u1: new layout shell with sidebar + modular sections
upgrades.u2: stronger Y2K chroma palette and chrome/glass surfaces
upgrades.u5: separate internet archive page integrated into the overall style
